headlines: Brit competition cops order Google to make search rankings less mysterious
Helpdesk scammers are making house calls to make their lies feel more real
Windows update leaves third-party Office document launches in limbo
System76 boss reckons he can liberate the entire PC stack... just give him another 15 years
crew_quote: "Blimey, it’s so humid in here I could cook a curry just by standing around, but at least it’s not as mysterious as Google’s search rankings!"
